de.uka.ilkd.key.rule

Interface BuiltInRule

  • All Superinterfaces:
    Rule
    All Known Implementing Classes:
    AbstractSideProofRule, BlockContractRule, CloseAfterJoin, JoinRule, ModalitySideProofRule, OneStepSimplifier, QueryExpand, QuerySideProofRule, RuleAppSMT.SMTRule, UseDependencyContractRule, UseOperationContractRule, WhileInvariantRule

    public interface BuiltInRule
extends Rule
    Buit-in rule interface. As applications of this rule kind may not be successful in each case one has to ensure that the goal split is done only iff the application was successful.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      IBuiltInRuleApp createApp(PosInOccurrence pos, TermServices services) 
      boolean isApplicable(Goal goal, PosInOccurrence pio)
      returns true iff a rule is applicable at the given position.
      boolean isApplicableOnSubTerms() 

      • Methods inherited from interface de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.Rule

        apply, displayName, name

    • Method Detail

      • isApplicable

        boolean isApplicable(Goal goal,
                     PosInOccurrence pio)
        returns true iff a rule is applicable at the given position. This does not necessarily mean that a rule application will change the goal (this decision is made due to performance reasons)

      • isApplicableOnSubTerms

        boolean isApplicableOnSubTerms()

      • createApp

        IBuiltInRuleApp createApp(PosInOccurrence pos,
                          TermServices services)
